title: DTCC Partners with Chainlink for 24/7 Tokenized Collateral Management
summary: The Depository Trust & Clearing Corporation (DTCC) will use Chainlink's technology to manage collateral around the clock. This move aims to modernize financial infrastructure and improve efficiency.
body:
The Depository Trust & Clearing Corporation (DTCC), the world’s largest post-trade infrastructure provider, has announced it will integrate Chainlink’s technology into its tokenized collateral platform. This platform is set to launch in the fourth quarter of 2026. Chainlink, known for its secure and reliable data feeds, will help DTCC manage collateral 24/7, ensuring continuous and efficient operations.

This partnership is significant because it bridges traditional finance with blockchain technology. For everyday people, this means faster, more secure transactions. Imagine being able to transfer money or assets instantly, even outside of regular banking hours. This could make financial services more accessible and convenient for everyone.

If you hold assets or use financial services, this development could mean smoother and more reliable transactions in the future. Keep an eye out for updates on the launch of DTCC’s tokenized collateral platform. This could be a game-changer in how collateral is managed globally.
twitterThread:

This could make your transactions faster and more secure. Here's what you need to know:

They’re integrating Chainlink’s technology to manage collateral around the clock. 

Think of it like a super-secure, always-on system for tracking and transferring assets.

Here’s what this means for you: 

Faster, more reliable transactions. Imagine being able to move money or assets instantly, even at 3 AM. 

This could make financial services more accessible and convenient for everyone.

If you use financial services or hold assets, keep an eye out for updates on DTCC’s tokenized collateral platform. 

This could be a game-changer in how collateral is managed globally.
